infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to track your trip and ensure your safety.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We need your location to track your trip and send alerts to your trusted contacts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used for emergency surveillance and incident recording.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Smart Transport Safety to access your camera for emergency recording.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Smart Transport Safety to use your location for trip tracking and safety alerts.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Smart Transport Safety to track your location in the background during active trips.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Smart Transport Safety to use your location for trip tracking.
